title: Multi-Language Support
description: Browse code datasets in Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, Rust, Java, and more. Filter by language to find exactly what you need.

title: Smart Search
description: Full-text search across instructions, inputs, and outputs. Find relevant code snippets and documentation in seconds.

title: Rich Analytics
description: Visualize dataset composition by type, language, and framework. Understand trends across the repository ecosystem.

title: Trending Repos
description: Discover the most active repositories. Stay up to date with the latest open-source intelligence.

title: Interactive Filtering
description: Filter datasets by type, framework, category, and more. Combine filters to drill down to the exact data you need.

title: Developer Friendly
description: Access datasets programmatically via our REST API. Perfect for training, analysis, and research workflows.
